## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / tests

## PR Checklist

- [ ] Component files < 200 lines
- [ ] TypeScript — no `any`, all props typed
- [ ] Tests added / updated (coverage ≥ 80%)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
- [ ] Design tokens used (no hardcoded hex colors)
- [ ] Lazy-loaded where applicable (`defineAsyncComponent` / dynamic import)
